summary: Analyzed himalaya-manual-setup-guide.md and compared to current dotfiles configuration. The guide describes adding a Protonmail account (logos) to existing Gmail setup. Current state: only Gmail configured, Protonmail Bridge not installed, no Logos maildir exists. Implementation requires updating home.nix (add protonmail-bridge package, himalaya logos account, mbsync logos channels, maildir activation) plus manual steps (Bridge login, keyring password storage).

artifacts.summary: Research report comparing manual setup guide to current configuration, with specific Nix configuration blocks needed for implementation

next_steps: Run /plan 20 to create implementation plan for updating home.nix with Protonmail account configuration
